name: claude-hooks-server-identity
tags: server-session-id, fastapi, health-endpoint, server-memory, sqlite, cross-session, server-restart
body: The hook server generates a unique SERVER_SESSION_ID (UUID) on startup, stored in server_memory.py. Logged at startup: `hook-server: started, server_session=<id>`. Exposed via GET /health which returns {status: 'ok'}. The server_session_id distinguishes the running server instance — useful for detecting restarts. Session data is stored in SqliteSaver checkpoints keyed by claude session_id, not server_session_id.
